posts.text: 🇧🇭 Multiple massive explosions have been reported in Bahrain and smoke is seen rising over the US Navy's Fifth Fleet HQ.

posts.text: Many in Donald Trump’s court—including the vice president and secretary of war—took part in previous ground wars in the Middle East. They should speak up about the dangers now. To learn why, register to read the full story (it’s free) https://www.economist.com/leaders/2026/03/31/the-perils-of-a-ground-war-in-iran?taid=69cc777843cf4a0001a4de94&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

posts.text: BREAKING: The UAE is preparing to help the US and other allies open the Strait of Hormuz by force, a move that would make it the first Gulf country to join the Iran War, per WSJ.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter

posts.text: Got a little more than an hour of pumps left, then they can issue a denial…
